steps.title: Expand and collect C terms
steps.content:
Expand $PC = N(22 - C)$ to get $$PC = 22N - NC$$
Add $NC$ to both sides to collect all $C$ terms: $$PC + NC = 22N$$

steps.title: Factor and solve for C
steps.content:
Factor $C$ from the left side: $$C(P + N) = 22N$$
Divide both sides by $(P + N)$: $$C = \frac{22N}{P + N}$$
Since $P + N = N + P$, this is equivalent to $\frac{22N}{N + P}$, so C is correct.
